sub_modules.harris_sobel3x3: Combinational 3x3 Sobel gradient operator producing signed X and Y gradients.
sub_modules.harris_grad_products: Combinational gradient product unit computing Ix squared, Iy squared, and IxIy.
sub_modules.harris_gaussian3x3: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian smoothing stencil for the gradient product streams.
sub_modules.harris_response: Combinational fixed-point Harris response arithmetic using determinant, trace squared, and configurable k.
sub_modules.harris_threshold: Combinational pointwise threshold decision producing the binary corner map.
